commit.message:
feat: simemu 0.1.0 — simulator allocation manager for multi-agent development

Full-featured simulator allocation CLI for concurrent Claude agent workflows.
Prevents agents fighting over the same iOS simulators and Android emulators by
giving each agent named reservations (slugs) with all operations proxied through
this CLI. A guard hook blocks direct xcrun simctl / adb calls globally.

Core features:
- Named reservation system with permanent slugs (never auto-expire)
- iOS (xcrun simctl) and Android (adb/emulator) platform support
- Genymotion Desktop integration — UUID detection, auto ADB connect
- Headless Android by default (saves 300–700 MB RAM per emulator)

Gesture proxy:
- tap, swipe, long-press, rotate, key events, shake, input text
- --pct flag: percentage coordinates (0.0–1.0) — eliminates device-specific
  pixel scaling bugs that caused 50+ missed taps across agent sessions

App lifecycle:
- install with --timeout (aborts with reboot hint instead of hanging forever)
- launch, terminate, uninstall, apps
- reset-app: force-stop + clear data + relaunch in one command
- clear-data (Android)

Capture pipeline:
- screenshot with --max-size (auto-resize for Claude vision API)
- compare: side-by-side composite of two simulators (ImageMagick)
- record: screen recording start/stop
- crash-log: iOS DiagnosticReports + Android logcat FATAL/ANR
- log: streaming logs with predicate/tag filtering
- check: verify simulator booted + app in foreground before flows

Device state:
- status-bar override, appearance (light/dark), biometrics (Face ID/fingerprint)
- network, battery, location, privacy permissions, animations

Maestro integration:
- simemu maestro <slug> <flow.yaml> resolves --device automatically

Infra:
- Idle-shutdown daemon (launchd LaunchAgent, configurable timeout)
- HTTP API server (FastAPI) for programmatic access
- fcntl file-locked state at /tmp/simemu/state.json
- Guard hook (PreToolUse) blocking xcrun simctl / adb / emulator calls
- One-line installer: curl -fsSL .../install.sh | bash

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Simulator allocation manager for multi-agent iOS and Android development

commit.message:
Add Phase 2 auto-execute to equipment optimizer

Extends the equipment optimizer to automatically execute proposed swaps
via OptDeviceInstaller server requests. On vehicle selection, the mod
analyzes equipment (active setup only), logs proposals, then executes
upgrades — demounting from source vehicles, installing upgrades, and
backfilling source vehicles with the best available from depot.

commit.message:
fix: fall back to git clone when no release exists; persist ~/.local/bin to PATH (#94)

- Bug 1: Non-dev installs no longer exit with an error when the GitHub
  releases API returns a 404 (no releases published yet). curl failure
  and empty tag_name now both trigger an automatic fallback to git clone
  with an informational message instead of a fatal error.

- Bug 2: After installing Claude Code, ~/.local/bin is now persisted to
  PATH in ~/.bashrc (and ~/.zshrc if it exists) so it survives new shell
  sessions. The file is only updated if it does not already contain a
  .local/bin entry.

commit.message:
Add plain file editing support to do() operations

Content operations (overwrite, replace_text, prepend, append) now work on
plain Drive files (markdown, JSON, SVG, YAML, etc.) — not just Google Docs.
Auto-detects file type via metadata pre-fetched at dispatch; routes Google
Docs to Docs API (unchanged), plain files to Drive Files API
(download-modify-upload). Closes the gap where the wiki pipeline's
text/markdown files couldn't be edited through mise.

Key decisions:
- Metadata pre-fetched once at dispatch level (zero extra API calls)
- Google Workspace types (Sheets/Slides) rejected with clear error
- Binary files rejected for text ops, allowed for overwrite
- Structured formats (SVG/JSON/XML) warn via cues.structured_format
- SVG (image/svg+xml) classified as text-safe for replace_text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix intermittent CSRF 403 by removing session dependency

The double-submit cookie pattern doesn't need session binding —
the httpOnly secure cookie + header match is sufficient protection.
Tying CSRF to session ID caused token invalidation whenever the
session was recreated by MongoStore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix date auto-fill timezone bug in template selection

Use local date formatting instead of toISOString() which converts to UTC
and can shift the date backward in positive timezone offsets. Also
simplified the Python-to-JS weekday conversion for clarity.

commit.message:
Filter non-GPU machines from utilization API

Mac now posts fleet checkins for CPU orchestrator monitoring but has no
GPU, so it was appearing in the warp speed gauge, live snapshot table,
and daily/weekly attainment columns with all-zero data and diluting
fleet averages. Filter machines whose checkin has no GPU telemetry
before passing to the utilization report builder.

commit.message:
fix: top-left button always says 'log in' and goes to /login

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Two-photo recipe capture: separate text and dish photos

Users now take two photos when adding a recipe from a cookbook:
1. Recipe text page (required) - processed by AI for extraction
2. Dish photo (optional) - uploaded to Supabase Storage as recipe image

This replaces the single-image approach with AI-based food photo
detection (food_photo_bounds). Dedicated text photos give the AI a
cleaner image to read, and the dish photo uploads directly with no
guesswork on crop regions.

- Added two-step capture dialog with preview for each photo
- Extracted convertToJpeg helper to deduplicate format conversion
- Updated mutation hook to accept { textImage, dishImage? }
- Improved AI prompt for multi-column cookbook layouts
- Removed food_photo_bounds from edge function (no longer needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: team member sees all tasks, not filtered to own tasks only

Removed default filterMember=memberId for team members.
They now see the full task tree (like PM) but edit restrictions remain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve Tailwind CSS content paths for Vite builds from project root

Tailwind was not scanning component files when Vite ran from the project
root, producing a 21KB CSS file with no utility classes. Inline PostCSS
config in vite.config.ts and use absolute paths in tailwind.config.js.

commit.message:
feat: on-chain DOOM — no_std engine, Substrate pallet, runtime API, RPC

- Engine: no_std compatible with fixmath module (libm in no_std, std::f64 in std)
- All types derive Encode/Decode/TypeInfo behind `substrate` feature flag
- pallet-doom: per-player game states, input queue, on_initialize tick loop
- doom-runtime-api: DoomApi trait (game_state, render_frame, has_active_game)
- pallet-doom-rpc: JSON-RPC handlers for frame delivery to browser clients
- Demo page copy updated to explain chain-renders-everything architecture

fix(btc): recompute_sopr_missing — full_history=True pour prix BTC depuis 2013

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(tests): make auth tests CI-compatible by mocking OPTIONPLAY_ADMIN_KEY

Tests were failing in CI where OPTIONPLAY_ADMIN_KEY env var is not set,
causing require_admin_key() to return 500 (not configured) instead of
the expected 401 (invalid key). Fixed by wrapping each test with
patch.dict to set a known test key.

fix: Update-Panel display:none entfernt – Restart-Button immer sichtbar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove status='active' filter from swipe seeder — hasInStock is the real availability indicator

The product data uses hasInStock (108k products) for availability, not
status='active' (only 112 products). The intersection with realStyle was 0,
causing empty swipe decks. Now 1,372 products are eligible across 8 styles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: value type inference, pluralization, and Schema.org type matching

- Infer value types from Schema.org DataType set and common aliases
  (Name→string, Price→number, etc.) plus positional heuristic
  (nouns only in object position → value type)
- Add best-effort pluralization with regular English rules
  (irregular plurals deferred to LLM layer)
- Auto-set valueType field on recognized value types
- Clean up completed plan files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Visual overhaul: warm textures, depth, and richness throughout

- Warmer color palette: brown-tinted backgrounds replace flat black
- Rich gradient backgrounds per section (no more identical flat #0A0A0A)
- Gold gradient section dividers with subtle line separators
- Curved SVG wave dividers between hero and about sections
- Cards now have warm brown gradient backgrounds with visible shadows
- Hero: breathing glow animation, decorative flourish, dot pattern
- Stronger noise texture overlay (0.035 → 0.06 opacity)
- Ambient warm body glow with gold/crimson radial gradients
- Buttons: enhanced shadows and gradient transitions
- Section headings: larger font, gradient underline
- Monogram: bigger with gold drop shadow
- Overall feel: artisan bakery warmth vs cold tech template

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update Homepage Event Query (#38)

* Refactor event queries in front-page.php to use post types and meta keys from `tribe_events` post type. Remove unused tax queries for event categories.

* Fix undefined array key "fields" warning

* Adjust homepage events query to add tax query.

* Refactor events query in front-page.php to consolidate upcoming and ongoing events into a single query. Update date format for event comparisons and adjust meta query logic for better clarity and performance.

* Update date presentation logic in grid templates.

* Update date query to use current_time instead of date fn.

* Remove unused tax query for event categories in front-page.php to streamline the events query.

* Implement formatted event date function and update event date handling in templates. Remove commented-out date logic for clarity.

* Roll back merged WP_Query into separate queries to resove broken page from slow query.

* Another try at merging the queries into one.

* Use Tribe Events methods to query the data, instead of WP_Query.

* Update events page template query - maybe delete later.

* Port ongoing event query logic to tribe_get_events implementation.

Events spanning multiple days were dropped from the homepage and events
page once their start date passed. Add a separate ongoing-events query
(start <= now, end > now) using TEC meta fields, then merge, deduplicate,
and sort by _EventStartDate so multi-day events remain visible until
they end, ordered correctly by start date.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Reapply proper query posts-per-page count

* Omit meetings from the front page events query.

* Only pull in events tagged as CURE SYNGAP1.
